unique_mechanics: Security Zones from production structures grant friendly units +10% armor and passive regeneration.
Arrest & Interrogate can convert defeated human Syndicate units into ongoing Intel and Evidence value.

tier_2.name: Riot Vanguard
tier_2.weapon: Kinetic shotgun and heavy ballistic shield
abilities: Shield Wall: blocks 75% of frontal projectile damage while stationary.
Flashbang: blinds and silences nearby units for 3 seconds.
tier_2.tactical_use: Absorb ambush damage and protect the line during hard pushes.

tier_2.name: K-9 Drone Operator
abilities: Release the Hounds: deploy Cyber-Canines that hunt stealthed infiltrators.
Proximity Sensor: reveal a small fog-of-war area and cloaked units.
tier_2.tactical_use: Counter stealth from behind the Vanguard line.

tier_3.name: Enforcer Armored Patrol Vehicle
abilities: Riot Cleaver: ram through light barriers and ignore slows.
Garrison: carry two infantry squads safely across hazardous terrain.
tier_3.tactical_use: Rapid response and perimeter breach support.

tier_3.name: Elite Magistrate
abilities: Tactical Focus: aura grants allies +1 attack range.
Judicial Strike: calls an orbital pinpoint laser from the Watchtower.
tier_3.tactical_use: Late-game army anchor; protect this hero carefully.

unique_mechanics: Underground Network lets structures hide in fog of war until they attack or are detected.
Siphon lets mobile units steal Credits or Alloy from resource nodes without an extraction building.

tier_2.name: Shadow-Stalker Infiltrator
abilities: Active Cloaking: invisible while moving until detected or attacking.
Sabotage Charge: structural explosive detonates after 8 seconds.
tier_2.tactical_use: Slip into a base and destroy priority infrastructure.

tier_2.name: Smuggler Bruiser
tier_2.weapon: Modified mining laser that ramps damage on a sustained target
abilities: Adrenaline Surge: restore 25% health and resist crowd control for 4 seconds.
Scavenge: defeating a vehicle grants 50 Lunar Alloy.
tier_2.tactical_use: Break heavy Peacekeeper lines and punish armored units.

tier_3.name: Widowmaker Sky-Skiff
abilities: Air Drop: deploy two infantry anywhere, ignoring ground obstacles.
Chaff Flare: break missile locks and orbital tracking.

tier_3.name: The Fixer
abilities: Bribery Aura: nearby enemy Tier 1 units deal 20% less damage.
Blackout: darkens enemy mini-map and communications for 10 seconds.
tier_3.tactical_use: Blind a defender immediately before a decisive push.

unique_mechanics: Corruption Grid spreads from structures, slows enemy units by 15%, and reduces basic radar visibility.
Bio-Mechanical Evolution spends Evidence and Lunar Alloy to permanently mutate weapons, armor, or abilities.

tier_2.name: Abyssal Defiler
abilities: Subterranean Burrow: hide underground and stun targets on emergence.
Corrosive Vomit: shred 30% of armor for 6 seconds.
tier_2.tactical_use: Bypass Shield Walls and crack armored formations.

tier_2.name: Nullborn Siphon
abilities: Infect Node: lock down enemy extraction and redirect half the income.
Neural Disruption: temporarily turn an enemy mechanical unit.
tier_2.tactical_use: Hijack enemy infrastructure and counter drone-heavy forces.

tier_3.name: Goliath Flesh-Titan
abilities: Grave Spores: temporarily revive fallen infantry as Scavengers.
Bio-Mass Shield: consume a friendly Tier 1 unit for a large shield.

tier_3.name: The Singularity
tier_3.role: Ultimate force multiplier and disruption hero
abilities: Eldritch Growth: spreads Corrupted Ground around itself.
Reality Tear: pull and freeze enemy units for 4 seconds.
tier_3.tactical_use: Group enemies for catastrophic follow-up damage.
